tool.name: TBConsensusAligner
tool.description: Generate consensus genomes and a variable alignment from MTBC VCF files
tool.command:
set -euo pipefail;
mkdir -p output && mkdir -p input_vcfs &&
## Symlink VCFs #for $vcf in $vcf_files: #set $id = $vcf.element_identifier #set $safename = $id if $id.lower().endswith('.vcf') else $id + '.vcf' ln -s '$vcf' 'input_vcfs/$safename' && #end for
python '$__tool_directory__/main_galaxy.py' -s '$step' #if $step == 'all' and $mode: -m '$mode' #end if
#for $vcf in $vcf_files: #set $id = $vcf.element_identifier #set $safename = $id if $id.lower().endswith('.vcf') else $id + '.vcf' -v 'input_vcfs/$safename' #end for
-r '$reference' -d '$depth' #if $outgroup_vcf: -c '$outgroup_vcf' -n '$outgroup_vcf.element_identifier' #end if #if $bed_files: #for $bed in $bed_files: -b '$bed' #end for #end if -o 'output' -g $undefined_states #if $test_mode: $test_mode #end if

param.name: step
param.label: Workflow steps to run
param.help: Run either consensus, or both consensus and snp_aligner

param.name: mode
param.label: Output mode (only if step = all)
param.help: If -s all then output either just SNP alignment or both the alignment and the consensus fasta files

param.name: vcf_files
param.label: Input VCF files
param.help: path to the input directory with all the vcf files

param.name: depth
param.label: Depth file
param.help: Depth file per position, output of samtools depth

param.name: outgroup_vcf
param.label: Outgroup VCF file
param.help: Outgroup VCF required for variable alignment

param.name: bed_files
param.label: BED files
param.help: Optional BED files to mask certain genomic regions

param.name: undefined_states
param.label: Allowed percentage of undefined states per polymorphic positions
param.help: Adjust to control for how many undefined states ('N', 'X', '-') you allow per genomic position in the alignment. Lower value is more strict

param.name: output_dir
param.label: Output Directory
param.help: Output directory for consensus files and the variable alignment

tool.help:
Usage: TBConsensusAligner [options]
Options: -s STR ['consensus' or 'all'] Create either consensus files or consensus files and a variable alignment
-m STR ['everything' or 'alignment_only'] If -s all is chosen, output either consensus files and the alignment or just the alignment
-v list[STR] Path to the input VCF files
-r STR Path to the reference genome
-d STR Path to the depth file created by samtools depth
-c STR Path to the outgroup VCF for the alignment
-b list[STR] Path to the BED files to mask certain genomic regions
-o STR Path to the output directory
-g FLOAT Percentage of undefined states allowed per polymorphic position in the alignment default at 90 percent value=0.9
-t BOOLEAN Test Mode to run the script with smaller genomes

citations.citation: @misc{githubtbconsensusaligner, author = {Schüpbach, Gian}, year = {2026}, title = {TBConsensusAligner}, publisher = {GitHub}, journal = {GitHub repository}, url = {https://github.com/scg40/GOMA-Pipeline-Documentation}, }
